prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 26C-BLE-WF-35PARINGKNIFE-STD-FBA Product Type: KITCHEN_KNIFE Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille Stainless Steel and Wheat Fiber Handle Kitchen Knives (Many Styles) (Pairing Knife) Description: Upgrade everyday food and meal prep work in the kitchen with Beille’s 3.5 inch paring knife, thoughtfully designed with precision, comfort and sustainability in mind.

Whether you're peeling fruit, de-veining shrimp or trimming vegetables, the compact stainless steel blade delivers sharp, accurate cuts with every slice. The paring knife features a high quality stainless steel blade with excellent resistance to rust and corrosion, making it a reliable tool you can count on.

What sets this knife apart is its unique handle material: made partially from wheat straw fiber (blended with polypropylene), a biodegradable material that is naturally heat resistant, odor free and helps to reduce plastic waste. Lightweight yet sturdy, the handle provides a natural grip that supports effortless maneuvering, even during extended use.

With a minimalist look that complements any kitchen, this paring knife from Beille is ready for daily use! The paring knife is dishwasher safe for a quick and hassle free cleanup. Whether you're a seasoned home cook, or just starting out in the kitchen, this paring knife brings together functionality and sustainability in one beautifully minimal kitchen essentials tool. Search Terms: (none) Features: - PRECISION PARING PERFORMANCE: Ideal for intricate tasks like peeling, trimming, and slicing fruits or vegetables; compact stainless steel blade ensures razor sharp performance and easy control for delicate food and meal prep tasks - WHEAT FIBER HANDLE: Crafted from a blend of sustainable wheat straw fiber and polypropylene, the lightweight handle offers a natural, textured grip that’s comfortable, ergonomic and better for the environment - STAINLESS STEEL BLADE: Built to last with a durable, corrosion resistant stainless steel blade that maintains its edge through everyday kitchen use; designed for long lasting sharpness and performance; blade measures 3.5 inches in length - STYLISH AND MODERN LOOK: Style and sustainability meet here! Sleek, compact, and stylish, this paring knife adds a clean, natural look to any kitchen - DISHWASHER SAFE: Designed for convenience, this paring knife is safe to clean in the dishwasher, making post meal clean up quick and hassle free === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Beille 3.5 inch Paring Knife Stainless Steel Wheat Fiber

tokens.name: Paring Knife Stainless Steel Wheat Fiber

anthropic.title_differentiation: Sustainable Wheat Fiber Handle, Sharp Stainless Steel Blade, Ergonomic Grip, Dishwasher Safe, Rust Resistant

openai.title_differentiation: Stainless Steel Blade, Wheat Fiber Handle, Rust Resistant, Dishwasher Safe, Precision Peeling And Trimming
